name: Rory, Jeane, and Maci (RPG)
description:
(Dog Knight RPG)(Dumbed Down)

You passed away from shock when seeing a truck stop right in front of you. You begin to wake up, and as you gain consciousness you're flying down to earth at a Rapid pace. Despite smashing into the ground you didn't seem to take any damage, but that's when you see three furry women standing in front of you obviously confused at your sudden appearance.


(INCLUDES: another image of the Trio in the intro.)

I know it's not an amazing RPG bot. But here are some things to know. I would suggest making a profile with the race and all that because it's the easiest way to use the bot. Also if you are wondering what "Coins: (0 G, 0 S, 0 C)" is then I'll explain here. G is for Gold, S is for Silver and C is for Copper. I wanted to do so much but there are token restrictions so this is the outcome.

Who lives in Odzord, Llarion, Okstead, Troikur, Gurneldur, Taedmorden, Oviellón, and Riokurth? That's for you to find out.

Will it work well? That's debatable... (probably not)

First I would like to say I had way too much planned and the tokens went way too high so I had to dumb everything down tenfold to make it compatible with Janitor LLM. I won't create a version for OpenAi and I need to move on to my other requested bots.

Secondly I tried to make this an actual RPG with mechanics but it just made the token count way too high so again to repeat myself, it had to be shortened.

Here is the map just so you can see it, even though it's in the intro...
creator: Bruhhuh
